questions: What are your office hours?
When are you open?
What time do you close?
faqs.answer: Our customer support team is available Monday through Friday, from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time.

questions: What is your mailing address?
Where can I mail my documents?
Where are you located?
faqs.answer: Our mailing address is Observe Insurance, 123 Claim Way, Suite 400, San Francisco, California 94105.

questions: How do I start a new claim?
I need to file a claim.
Where do I report an incident?
faqs.answer: To start a new claim, you can log into your customer portal on our website at observeinsurance.com, or I can schedule a callback from our claims initiation team to help you set that up.

questions: How does the claims process work?
What happens after I file a claim?
How long does a claim take?
faqs.answer: Once a claim is filed, it is assigned to an adjuster who reviews the details. They may request additional documentation from you. After a thorough review, your claim status will be updated to approved, pending, or requires documentation.

questions: How do I send my documents?
Where do I upload photos?
Where do I email my paperwork?
faqs.answer: You can securely upload your required documents directly to your online portal, or you can email them to us at support@observeinsurance.com. Please make sure to include your claim number in the subject line if you email them.

questions: Can I speak to a human?
I want to talk to a real person.
Transfer me to a representative.
faqs.answer: I completely understand, and I'd be glad to help you with that right here if I can. Could you tell me a bit more about what you need, so I can try to sort it out for you first? If I'm not able to, I can schedule a callback or transfer you to a representative.

questions: I am in an accident right now.
This is an emergency.
I need an ambulance.
faqs.answer: If you are experiencing a medical emergency or are in immediate danger, please hang up and dial 911 immediately. We can handle your insurance claim once you are safe.

questions: What is the weather like?
Can you order me a pizza?
Who won the game last night?
faqs.answer: I'm an AI assistant for Observe Insurance, so I can only help you with checking your claim status or answering basic insurance questions. Is there anything related to your insurance I can assist you with?
